overall.description: First-person perspective walking along a dirt trail through a grassy field at night, illuminated by a flashlight. The scene appears to be from a video game engine, depicting an empty natural environment with distant trees and scattered rocks along the path.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt path using a flashlight to illuminate the way ahead through the dark field

entered.detail: narrow dirt path winding through the grass, illuminated by the flashlight
tall green grass covering the open field on the left side of the path
tall green grass covering the open field on the right side of the path
large fallen tree trunk lying beside the path
dark silhouette of trees on the horizon against the night sky
rocks and stones scattered along the edge of the trail

segments.scene_description: Walking steadily along a dirt path through an open grassy field at night. The flashlight illuminates the trail ahead, revealing scattered rocks and fallen logs along the sides, with a dark tree line visible in the distance against the night sky. The environment is empty and quiet, with only the illuminated path visible in the darkness.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement along a desolate dirt trail that cuts through a vast, dark grassy field. It begins with a steady forward progression, where a flashlight beam carves a narrow path of visibility through the oppressive night. As the camera advances, the light reveals scattered rocks and fallen logs lining the edges of the trail, emphasizing the isolation of the environment. The scene then opens up to show a distant, dark tree line silhouetted against the night sky before the camera continues its quiet journey deeper into the empty landscape.
